form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 2.25 lengths third but did run a quick 23.01 over the 400m journey. Looms as the one to beat this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 2.25 lengths third but did run a quick 23.01 over the 400m journey. Looms as the one to beat this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn and fell.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 525m at this track behind Maximum Damage beaten 15 lengths (31.43). Was in the money six on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 525m at this track behind Maximum Damage beaten 15 lengths (31.43). Was in the money six on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Nowra to win by 6 lengths in 20.83, beating Scotch Chaser. Last start finished 7th on March 30 over 365m at Nowra behind Rivendell beaten 11 lengths (21.49) in a Grade 5. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Nowra to win by 6 lengths in 20.83, beating Scotch Chaser. Last start finished 7th on March 30 over 365m at Nowra behind Rivendell beaten 11 lengths (21.49) in a Grade 5. Well placed and among the chances here.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the turn out of the back straight came together.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (23.15) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (23.15) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together at the turn out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at Wentworth Park but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Boxed awkwardly and looks safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time at Wentworth Park but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Boxed awkwardly and looks safely held.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the home straight and again in the home straight.

form.formComment: Recorded a 2.5 lengths win (33.19) in a Grade 5 last time at Temora. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Tough line-up and may struggle.

formComments.comment: Recorded a 2.5 lengths win (33.19) in a Grade 5 last time at Temora. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a neck at this track over 400m (23.13) beating West End Lass in Grade 5 on April 10. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by a neck at this track over 400m (23.13) beating West End Lass in Grade 5 on April 10. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recent effort finished 4th on April 8 over 570m at Temora behind Scrutinise beaten 4 lengths (33.47) in a Grade 5. This appears within her reach.
